entry.title: GitHub Drops Moonshot AI's Open-Weight Kimi K2.7 Into Copilot's Model Picker
entry.summary: Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code is the first open-weight model in GitHub Copilot's picker, bringing a 1T-parameter MoE coding model to millions of VS Code users at lower cost.

entry.title: Kilo Puts Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Against Real Bugs and Finds a Surprising Weakness
entry.summary: Kilo ran a controlled code-review benchmark on GLM-5.2 and found prompt wording matters more than reasoning effort â with a clear local-vs-cross-file split

entry.title: Sakana AI's Sheaf-ADMM Solves Multi-Agent Sudoku at 92.6% Where Rivals Hit 34%
entry.summary: Sakana AI's Sheaf-ADMM fuses distributed optimization theory and algebraic topology to build transparent, coordination-native neural networks accepted at ICML 2026

entry.title: Jesse Vincent's Superpowers 6 Cuts AI Coding Costs 60% After Overnight Fable Experiments
entry.summary: Superpowers 6 adds Kimi Code support and slashes build costs by 60% using Anthropic's Fable to optimize its own workflow overnight

entry.title: Ant Group Pushes Qwen3-Omni to 5.4x Faster With 0.6s Audio Response
entry.summary: vLLM-Omni's staged pipeline engineering cuts Qwen3-Omni's first audio latency from 6s to 0.6s and boosts throughput 5.4x on the same GPUs

entry.title: Sakana AI Unifies Two Rival AI Optimization Camps to Slash LLM Merging Costs
entry.summary: Sakana AI unifies two competing families of gradient-free optimizers into one framework, then uses the insight to merge LLMs cheaper and better.

entry.title: Alibaba's Wan Video Turns Any Photo Into a Music-Synced Dance Clip
entry.summary: Alibaba's Wan Video adds music-driven dance generation: upload a character image, pick a style, and get a beat-synced video in seconds

entry.title: UN and ITU Pull Jensen Huang, Andy Jassy Into One AI Governance Body
entry.summary: Sakana AI's Ren Ito joins 40+ global tech and government leaders on the newly formed UN-ITU AI for Good Global Commission

entry.title: Anthropic Gives Claude API Builders 5x More Room to Scale
entry.summary: Anthropic raises Claude API rate limits across all tiers and drops spend-based tier progression, giving Sonnet and Haiku users up to 5x more throughput

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Triggers a 3.5x Record CVE Spike
entry.summary: AI-powered vulnerability hunting by Anthropic and OpenAI triggered a 3.5x spike in high-severity CVE disclosures, reshaping the entire cybersecurity landscape

entry.title: Runway Ships Agent Skills to Run Full Ad Campaigns With One Command
entry.summary: Runway adds slash-command Skills to its AI Agent, letting marketers build full ad campaigns, commercials, and localized assets in a single command

entry.title: Pika Labs Ships MCP to Bring Its Full Creative Engine Into Claude
entry.summary: Pika's new Voxel-It Skill turns any photo into a Minecraft-style world, while its MCP server brings the full creative suite into Claude, Codex, and more
